meta.title: SelfTour – Your AI-powered personal tour guide
meta.description: Discover stories behind nearby sights with your AI-powered personal tour guide. No searching online, planning routes, or booking tours.
meta.ogDescription: Discover stories behind nearby sights without searching online, planning routes, or booking tours.

hero.subtitle: Открывайте истории и интересные факты о достопримечательностях рядом с вами с помощью персонального ИИ-гида. Без поиска в интернете, планирования маршрутов и бронирования экскурсий.

city.title: Just walk. SelfTour app does the rest
city.body: Explore the city naturally while the app takes care of the storytelling. As you walk, nearby sights are automatically brought to life through immersive audio stories, turning every walk into a guided experience
city.noteEmphasis: with both headphones and your phone's speaker

benefits.title: Why Travelers Choose SelfTour app
benefits.subtitle: Everything you need to explore every city with confidence

personalGuide.title: Personal Guide
personalGuide.desc: Have a personal sights guide with you wherever and whenever you travel

instantKnowledge.title: Instant Knowledge
instantKnowledge.desc: Discover the stories behind sights without searching online - each story is crafted for you on demand

freedom.title: Freedom to Explore
freedom.desc: Explore whenever you want without planning routes, booking tours, or following schedules

steps.title: How It Works
steps.subtitle: Start exploring in seconds. Just open SelfTour app, begin your walk, and let your personal guide bring every nearby sight to life

1.title: Open
1.desc: Open SelfTour app and start your journey

2.title: Explore
2.desc: Walk naturally while nearby sights are detected automatically

3.title: Listen
3.desc: Enjoy immersive AI-crafted audio stories as you discover the city

features.title: Everything You Need to Explore Freely
features.subtitle: Designed to make every walk simpler, smarter, and more enjoyable

storyteller.title: AI Storyteller:
storyteller.desc: Engaging audio stories generated in real time for every sight you discover

audio.title: Freedom to Explore:
audio.desc: Explore at your own pace without fixed routes or tour groups

download.title: Download SelfTour
download.body: Your next walk will never be the same. Available now on iOS and Android — free to download, free to explore.

footer.taglineSecondary: Stories for every street you walk

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — SelfTour
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.introBefore: Welcome to SelfTour (“we,” “our,” or “us”). We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website
privacy.introAfter: and use the SelfTour mobile application.

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.locationText: To provide the core “Guide Mode” functionality, the app collects your device’s precise location data (GPS) even when the app is running in the background. You can disable this in your device settings, but the app will not function as intended.
s1.usageText: We automatically collect standard analytical data (including IP address, device type, operating system, and general app usage statistics) via trusted third-party analytics and performance tools to improve our service. We also use cookies and similar tracking technologies to analyze website traffic and enhance your browsing experience.
s1.accountText: If you choose to create an account, we may collect your email address and name.

s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
s2.intro: We use the collected data strictly to:
s2.item1: Provide, operate, and maintain the AI audio guide services.
s2.item2: Track app performance, monitor crashes, and fix technical bugs.
s2.item3: Send you essential technical updates and promotional materials (only if you have opted in).

s3.title: 3. Data Sharing and Third Parties
s3.body: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data. We only share information with trusted third-party service providers (such as analytics, cloud hosting, and database services) that are necessary to operate the app, comply with legal obligations, or protect our rights.

s4.title: 4. Data Security & Retention
s4.body: We implement standard industry security measures to protect your data. However, no electronic transmission over the internet or storage system is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security. We retain your data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy.

s5.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR & CCPA)
s5.before: Depending on your geographical location, you have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data collected by the app. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us directly at

s6.title: 6. Contact Us
s6.intro: If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Use — SelfTour
terms.heading: Terms of Use
terms.introBefore: This Agreement is a legally binding contract between the User (“you”) and SelfTour (“we,” “our,” or “us”). Please read these Terms of Use carefully before downloading or using the SelfTour mobile application and visiting our website

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.body: By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the SelfTour app, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these Terms, you must stop using our services and delete the application from your device.

s2.title: 2. Disclaimer of AI Content
s2.p1: SelfTour utilizes artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to generate automated audio excursions, localized commentary, and historical facts. All content within the app is provided on an “as-is” and “as-available” basis.
s2.p2: We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, historical truth, or reliability of any information provided by the AI audio guide. The content is provided for general informational and entertainment purposes only.

s3.title: 3. User Safety and Limitation of Liability
s3.awarenessText: When using the app’s “Guide Mode” with headphones or earbuds, you remain fully and solely responsible for your own safety. You must maintain full awareness of your physical surroundings, pedestrian traffic, vehicles, and strictly comply with local safety laws and regulations.
s3.liabilityText: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, SelfTour, its founders, partners, and employees shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. This includes, but is not limited to, physical injuries, bodily harm, traffic accidents, lost or stolen personal property, or user dissatisfaction with the content resulting directly or indirectly from the use of the app.

s4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
s4.body: All application designs, user interfaces, logos, software, text, graphics, branding elements, and AI-generated audio tracks are the exclusive intellectual property of SelfTour and are protected by international copyright and trademark laws. You may not copy, reverse-engineer, modify, distribute, or reuse our content without prior explicit written permission.

s5.title: 5. Termination of Service
s5.body: We reserve the right, without prior notice and at our sole discretion, to terminate your user license, delete your account, or block your access to the application if we determine that you have violated these Terms of Use or used the service inappropriately.

s6.title: 6. Changes to These Terms
s6.body: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. If we make changes, we will update the “Last updated” date at the top of this page. By continuing to use the SelfTour app after any changes become effective, you agree to the revised Terms.

s7.title: 7. Contact Us
s7.intro: If you have any questions, feedback, or legal inquiries regarding these Terms, please contact us at:
